Placement: Instagram Story event ad
Required canvas: 1080 x 1920 px
Required aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical
Top UI safe zone: keep essential text below 160 px.
Bottom UI safe zone: keep CTA above 176 px from bottom.
Side safe margin: 72 px.
Headline: maximum 2 lines, centered-left or centered, not rotated.
Logo: current horizontal school wordmark in upper-left below the top UI safe zone.
CTA: bottom third, inside safe area, button or strong typographic callout.
Contrast: if placed over student work or a light studio photo, add navy overlay at 55% opacity or use a solid cream card.
